zh.lifeSummary: 當Gómez García Carrillo於1200年出生在西班牙時，他的父親Gómez Ruiz Carrillo20歲，母親Dama De Carrillo19歲。他和Maria Rodriguez至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gómez García Carrillo于1200年出生在西班牙时，他的父亲Gómez Ruiz Carrillo20岁，母亲Dama De Carrillo19岁。他和Maria Rodriguez至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: García
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jesus, Carlos, Luis, Francisco, Pedro, Miguel, Jorge, Mario, Raul, Roberto, Ramon, Rafael.  Portuguese Wenceslao, Joao, Paulo, Catarina, Albeiro, Ligia, Godofredo, Lidio, Wenseslao, Adao, Afonso.

Spanish (García) and Portuguese: from a medieval personal name of uncertain origin. It is normally found in medieval records in the Latin form Garsea, and may well be of pre-Roman origin, perhaps akin to Basque (h)artz ‘bear’. This is the most common surname in Spain and also one of the most common surnames elsewhere in Spanish-speaking world. In the US, where it is also found among Native Americans (mainly Pueblos in NM), it is the sixth most frequent surname. Compare De Garcia .

variants.name: Grassia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Amedeo, Maurizio, Pasquale, Rocco, Salvatore.
Italian: from a metathesized form of the personal nameGarsia, from Spanish García (see Garcia ).

variants.name: Arcia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alberto, Francisco, Arturo, Dagoberto, Enrique, Jose, Ramiro, Adalberto, Aleida, Alejandro, Alfredo, Amalia.
Hispanic: probably an altered form of Spanish García (see Garcia ).

variants.name: Garcie
meanings: Altered form, under the French influence in LA, of Spanish García (see Garcia ). This form of the surname of Spanish origin is also found in southern France.
Spanish (Ávila): variant of García (see Garcia ).

variants.name: Garcilazo
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico and Argentina): altered form of Spanish (Valencia) Garcilaso, a compound of the personal name Garci (a short form of García, see Garcia ) and the nickname laso ‘weak, exhausted’.

variants.name: Gacia
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish García (see Garcia ).

variants.name: Garsia
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of   Garcia  .

variants.name: Gracia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Juan, Manuel, Francisco, Jesus, Luis, Guadalupe, Mario, Pedro, Javier, Jorge.

Spanish; Catalan (Gràcia): from a short form of the Christian religious epithet de la Gracia, meaning ‘of mercy’ and forming part of the Marian name Maria de la Gracia ‘(Holy) Mary of Grace’, from Spanish gracia, Catalan gràcia ‘grace, mercy’.
In some cases possibly also an altered form of Spanish García (see Garcia ).

variants.name: De Garcia
meanings: Spanish and Galician (De García); Portuguese: patronymic from Spanish and Galician García and Portuguese Garcia , with the preposition de ‘of’.

variants.name: Garces
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jorge, Carlos, Juan, Jose, Manuel, Cesar, Rafael, Luis, Fernando, Gustavo, Javier, Mario.  Portuguese Albeiro, Paulo.
Spanish; Catalan (Garcés); Portuguese (Garcês): patronymic from the personal name García (see Garcia ).

variants.name: Garzia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Mario, Alfredo, Ernestina, Fernando, Juan, Pedro, Ricardo.  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Ciro, Corrado.
Italianized form of Spanish   Garcia  .

nameMeanings.name: Carrillo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Carlos, Jesus, Manuel, Luis, Pedro, Francisco, Ruben, Miguel, Roberto, Mario.

Spanish: nickname for a person with some peculiarity of the cheek or jaw, Spanish carrillo. The word appears to be a diminutive of carro ‘cart, wagon’, and it has been suggested that the reference is to the movements of the jaw in chewing. The surname may also have denoted originally a bold or shameless person; for the semantic development compare Cheek .
Italian (Campania): probably from a diminutive of carro (see Carro ), unless it derives from the Spanish (see 1 above).

variants.name: Cheek
meanings: English: from Middle English cheeke (Old English cē(a)ce), used as a nickname for someone with some deformity or scar in the region of the cheek or jawbone. Compare Cheak and Chick .

nameMeanings.name: Gómez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘complete’ in Hebrew), borne by a son of Japheth and grandson of Noah. It is in occasional use in the United States. Gomer is also an English surname, derived from an Old English personal name composed of gōd ‘good’ + mǣr ‘famous’, and the given name may also be a transferred use of this.

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Gómez García Carrillo was born in 1200, in Spain, his father, Gómez Ruiz Carrillo, was 20 and his mother, Dama De Carrillo, was 19. He had at least 1 son with Maria Rodriguez.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gómez García Carrillo est né en 1200, à Espagne, son père, Gómez Ruiz Carrillo, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Dama De Carrillo, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Maria Rodriguez.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gómez García Carrillo 1200 in Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gómez Ruiz Carrillo 20 und seine Mutter Dama De Carrillo 19. Er hatte mit Maria Rodriguez mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gómez García Carrillo è nato il nel 1200 nel Spagna, il suo padre, Gómez Ruiz Carrillo, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Dama De Carrillo, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Maria Rodriguez.

ja.lifeSummary: Gómez García Carrilloが1200年にスペインで生まれた時，父Gómez Ruiz Carrilloは20歳，母Dama De Carrilloは19歳であった。彼はMaria Rodriguezとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Gómez García Carrillo(이)가 1200년 스페인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gómez Ruiz Carrillo(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Dama De Carrillo(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Maria Rodriguez(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gómez García Carrillo nasceu em 1200, em Espanha, seu pai, Gómez Ruiz Carrillo, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Dama De Carrillo, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Maria Rodriguez.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gómez García Carrillo родился в 1200 г. в местности Испания, его отцу по имени Gómez Ruiz Carrillo было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Dama De Carrillo, 19. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Maria Rodriguez.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gómez García Carrillo nació en 1200, en España, su papá, Gómez Ruiz Carrillo, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Dama De Carrillo, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Maria Rodriguez.
